{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211313338C3AA130981886B5D046"}"},"total":66},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7613542303742886680","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"内容丰富，节奏紧凑，结构清晰"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772670960,"group_id":"7582033421812108312","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/04oFiRyk6Xj2KOfxHXMCRBcGujd2+Cg3mbXKbnT1JC","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4118148310109223","user_name":"坚不可摧的白证明"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4118148310109223","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7582033421812108312","book_info":{"abstract":"本书通过一系列扣人心弦的情节，生动再现了康熙年间宫廷内外的权谋斗争、民间社会的风云变幻以及江湖侠士的忠义传奇。小说以康熙帝微服私访为引，串联起胡忠孝、马成龙、马梦太、顾焕章等众多英雄人物的命运起伏，展现了一幅波澜壮阔的历史画卷。
书中既有帝王将相的智慧与决断，也有平民百姓的苦难与抗争，更穿插了天地会等民间组织的秘密活动，情节跌宕起伏，人物形象鲜明。作者通过细腻的笔触，不仅描绘了朝廷政治的复杂与险恶，也歌颂了忠臣义士的豪情与胆识，呈现出一个充满正义与邪恶较量、忠诚与背叛交织的宏大时代。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/360cfaf7367e4348114720b22dfdc239~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"姜振名","author_id":"","book_id":"7582033421812108312","book_name":"康熙王朝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e06818","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"16万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":988,"name":"历史小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=988&name=历史小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7586510647710469144","read_count":"41337","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"760676"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"198","tags":"历史,历史小说","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/360cfaf7367e4348114720b22dfdc239~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779254013&x-signature=4cZwqVkIeo2w8yTIxQO0qZwpkxE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"61"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211313338C3AA130981886B5D046"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":25016,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":42271,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":149},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7602038223133049662","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真实客观播放流畅很好很好"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769992249,"group_id":"
